# Alex Rivera

## Summary

Full-stack engineer with 6 years of experience building high-traffic web applications and developer tools. Led the migration of a monolithic Rails app to a distributed microservices architecture serving 2M+ daily active users. Passionate about developer experience, observability, and making complex systems simple.

## Experience

### Wavelength Labs
#### Senior Software Engineer
**March 2022 - Present**
- Architected and shipped a real-time collaboration engine handling 50K concurrent connections using WebSocket clustering and CRDTs
- Led the platform team (4 engineers) to reduce deployment time from 45 minutes to 3 minutes through a custom CI/CD pipeline
- Built an internal developer portal that reduced onboarding time for new engineers from 2 weeks to 2 days
- Designed and implemented a feature flag system used across 12 microservices, enabling safe rollouts for 2M+ users

#### Software Engineer
**June 2020 - March 2022**
- Built the core API gateway handling 10K requests/second with sub-50ms p99 latency
- Migrated authentication system from session-based to JWT, reducing auth service load by 70%
- Created a shared component library used by 3 frontend teams, improving cross-team velocity

### Nimbus Technologies -- Backend Engineer
**January 2018 - May 2020**
- Designed and built the data pipeline processing 500M events/month for analytics dashboards
- Implemented rate limiting and circuit breaker patterns that eliminated cascading failures
- Contributed to open-source observability tools used by 200+ companies
